text:
YAGR-N101 is a vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft that appears in Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It is the successor of the UNAF Close Air Support VTOL Aircraft YAGR-3B.

Profile

The YAGR-N101 is mostly identical to its predecessor. It features two adjustable wing-mounted thrusters that rotate to allow vertical take-off and landing functionality as well as horizontal movement once in the air. Its blocky yet narrow main body has two forward cockpits, a large one on the dorsal side and a smaller one located ventrally. The ventral side also has two side-mounted pods containing retractible landing gear, with a third set of retractible landing gear stowed further towards the rear in the main body.

History

Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

Immediately prior to the attack of the Seventh Angel, Gendo Ikari is transported from Yui Ikari's grave to NERV HQ aboard a YAGR-N101.

Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo

The YAGR-N101 is operated by NERV and introduced sometime after the Near Third Impact to replace the UNAF Close Air Support VTOL Aircraft YAGR-3B.

Trivia

The YAGR-N101 first appears in Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo.

Kotobukiya created a 1/100 scale model kit of the YAGR-N101 and released it alongside Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo in mid April 2012. The model was reissued in August 2020.
